finding: Adapter-side finish_reason canonicalization makes Anthropic 'stop_sequence'->'stop', so MCP stopReason reports 'endTurn' instead of 'stopSequence' and the raw-string arms are dead.

OpenAiCompat reasoning branch strips sampling whenever openai_reasoning_family matches, so an explicit row override supports_sampling_params:true cannot re-enable sampling, contradicting row-wins precedence.
from_anthropic_http routes every status through type-based mapping when the envelope parses, dropping the old 400-only guard so a non-400 with a mismatched type is misclassified.
Untrusted Gemini block_reason is embedded into a ProviderError without sanitize_error_body, unlike every other untrusted string in the change.
from_gemini_http classifies solely by parsed RPC status; a 429/401 whose status field is empty/non-standard is downgraded to a generic provider error, losing rate_limit/auth typing.
from_anthropic_http maps by error type for ALL statuses, so a 404 not_found_error becomes provider instead of invalid_request.
The raw-string finish_reason arms are dead code because provider paths canonicalize finish_reason before it reaches this handler.
provider_family_for duplicates the provider_type->family classification that lives authoritatively in ai-providers Provider::new; the two lists can drift.
OPENAI_ERR_400 sends Content-Length:118 for a 122-byte body so reqwest truncates the JSON and the OpenAI typed-parse path is never exercised.
openai_400 only asserts InvalidRequest, which from_status_code(400) also returns, so it passes even if the typed branch is broken.
gemini_error test pairs each HTTP status with an rpc status mapping to the same variant, so the rpc-status arms could be deleted and still pass.
openai_200 finish assertion uses SSE 'stop' which canonicalizes to identity, so it does not exercise OpenAiCompat finish-reason canonicalization.
TriStateSelect/ThinkingStyleSelect do not forward the aria-label FormField injects, so both controls have no distinct accessible name.
The wrappers swallow id/name/aria-describedby/onBlur/ref injected by FormField, breaking error linking, touched-state, and RHF focus-on-error (ref warning on a non-forwardRef component).
MCP stopReason mapping still switches on raw provider finish_reason but upstream now canonicalizes, so the raw arms are unreachable.
finish_reason canonicalized in adapters before this map changes MCP stopReason output for non-target providers (stop_sequence->endTurn).
drive_sse has each map_event heap-allocate an EventOutcome.items Vec per emitted event, an allocation the prior direct-yield code avoided.
resolve() adds a per-request model_registry::lookup to the OpenAI/Gemini build paths; the miss path is an O(N) scan allocating a format! per catalog entry.
No concurrency issues: per-stream state owned in the generator, Send bounds complete, no shared mutable state introduced.
[re-audit-1] Row override supports_sampling_params:true re-inserted sampling even for a thinking-active Anthropic request, violating the thinking-omit-sampling invariant.
[re-audit-1] anthropic_200 mock puts stop_reason under 'message' matching ziee's verbatim-moved parser, not necessarily every Anthropic API version.
[re-audit-1] openai_200 finish 'stop' cannot distinguish raw vs canonical; the anthropic end_turn test already proves raw-emission.
[re-audit-1] Selects don't spread FormField aria-describedby/invalid/aria-required; moot because these Option toggles have no validation so those props are never injected.
[re-audit-1] Per-row help is a visual span not FormField description; help remains visible text adjacent to the labeled control.
